title: Chat-Transform
description: Apply substitutions (katakana, hiragana, owo, ...) to chat messages
body: Chat-Transform allows you to easily select text to replace in chat messages. It comes preconfigured with replacements for romaji->hiragana and romaji->katakana transformation as well as good old owoification. Replacements are applied to your messages as you type them or, if you prefer that, when you send them.
